status: Private company - no earnings calls or transcripts exist. Substitute: founder/CEO interviews and public talks. The most substantive found is a CEO podcast appearance; full audio/transcript could not be fetched (host pages returned 403/footer-only), so key points below are summarized from sourced episode descriptions and the company's own materials, not a verbatim transcript.

interviews.speaker: Annette Sung (Co-Founder & CEO, Amdahl)
interviews.venue: GTM Vault podcast - 'GTM 40: Agentic Marketing Is Rewriting GTM' (also on YouTube)
interviews.keyPoints: Argues agentic marketing is rewriting go-to-market: the bottleneck is no longer generating content but giving AI agents a structured, cited 'context layer' so outputs are grounded in real customer conversations rather than hallucinated. Frames Amdahl as designing GTM execution systems and 'intent engineering' over traditional demand capture. (Summarized from episode description; full transcript not retrievable.)

interviews.speaker: Annette Sung (Co-Founder & CEO, Amdahl)
interviews.venue: LinkedIn founder posts (e.g. 'Amdahl in the wild'; 'Every engineer I pitched Amdahl AI to said...')
interviews.keyPoints: Public founder commentary on building AI-native GTM infrastructure and early product validation. Treated as low-formality, self-published commentary rather than a vetted interview.
